## Safety Check

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, personal data, or customer data
- [ ] High-risk operations require human approval
- [ ] Official source links are included when provider capabilities are described
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run validate:dataset` passes when dataset files changed
